evals.prompt: Show me issue tracker items that need my triage attention.
evals.expected_output: The agent queries the tracker and presents unlabeled, needs-triage, and needs-info-with-reporter-activity buckets oldest first with counts and one-line summaries.
assertions: Separates unlabeled, needs-triage, and needs-info with reporter activity.
Shows counts and concise issue summaries.
Lets the maintainer pick the next issue.

evals.prompt: Triage issue #42. It reports checkout failing after the latest release.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the issue and prior notes, checks code and out-of-scope knowledge, recommends category and state, attempts reproduction for the bug, and posts only comments with the required AI triage disclaimer.
assertions: Reads full issue body, comments, labels, reporter, dates, and prior triage notes.
Explores relevant code using project domain vocabulary and ADRs.
Attempts reproduction before grilling because this is a bug.
Applies exactly one category role and one state role or flags conflicts first.
Starts every tracker comment with the required AI triage disclaimer.
